name: Elliptic
description: Elliptic — Blockchain analytics and crypto compliance platform screening transactions for AML, sanctions, and illicit activity.

seo.title: Elliptic — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Elliptic: Elliptic — Blockchain analytics and crypto compliance platform screening transactions for AML, sanctions, and illicit activity.

when_to_use: Crypto transaction AML screening against OFAC sanctions
Blockchain analytics for VASP Travel Rule compliance
Illicit activity detection for exchange deposit monitoring
DeFi smart contract exposure scoring for institutional investors
Crypto forensics API for law enforcement investigations

pros: Extensive chain coverage including DeFi and bridges
Risk scoring respected by banks and regulators
Sanctions screening updated with rapid turnaround
cons: Enterprise pricing locks out small crypto startups
False positives can slow customer onboarding
Risk methodology partially opaque — trust the vendor
Chain coverage still lags some niche L2s
review.verdict: One of the default crypto AML vendors for regulated institutions — challenger startups should shop on price.
review.best_for: Crypto exchanges, banks, and fintechs with serious AML obligations
review.not_for: Early-stage crypto projects or informal compliance needs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
